init-branding-step.description: Optional branding opt-in step inserted between discovery and granularity in init

branding-inline-mode.description: Branding SKILL.md must support condensed inline interview mode (soft dependency -- init works without it but provides richer experience with it)

skip-is-default.description: Skip branding during init must be the default/prominent option with zero side effects

no-server-during-init.description: Branding server must NOT be started during the init flow

question-budget.description: Branding during init uses at most 1 opt-in + 1 possible re-init check + 5 interview questions (max 7 total AskUserQuestion calls)

definition.scope: Insert optional branding step into project init flow at step 4B.5. Single opt-in question with condensed inline interview. No server start. Context-aware framing.

tasks.description: Add branding opt-in gate at init step 4B.5
tasks.acceptance: Init flow presents branding opt-in after discovery areas
2-3 question interview generates BRANDING.md and index.html
Branding works even when .planning/ does not yet exist

acceptance: All tasks complete with passing tests
Skip path has zero side effects
